transcript_segments.text: हमें पेमेंट इंटीग्रेशन में दिक्कत आ रही है।
transcript_segments.translated_text: We have a problem with the payment integration.

transcript_segments.text: हमने तय किया है कि लॉन्च एक हफ्ते आगे बढ़ेगा।
transcript_segments.translated_text: We decided to move the launch by one week.

transcript_segments.text: राहुल शुक्रवार तक संशोधित डेक भेजेगा।
transcript_segments.translated_text: Rahul will send the revised deck by Friday.

promoted_decisions: We decided to move the launch by one week
promoted_action_items: Rahul will send the revised deck by Friday
